SELECTED PROJECTS
SkillBridge.AI: Resume Intelligence Platform
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Python, FastAPI, Arq, SSE, PostgreSQL, pgvector, Redis, OpenAI GPT-4o, R2  |  GitHub  |  Live
Sep 2025 – Present
• Led 4 engineers building an LLM platform comparing a resume and job posting to recommend skill-gap courses and projects.
• Extracted matched and missing skills from resume and job text with a FlashText NLP matcher over a 900+ skill taxonomy.
• Retrieved 200 of 5,000 courses with RAG and pgvector embeddings, then reranked to the top 2 by missing-skill coverage.
• Generated two GPT-4o projects scoped to missing skills, with validators rejecting 30% of drafts breaking tech-stack rules.
• Orchestrated the multi-stage analysis pipeline on Arq workers, streaming each stage's live progress to a Next.js UI over SSE.
ConvLens: CNN Interpretability Platform
Dec 2025 – Feb 2026
Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, FastAPI, PyTorch, Torchvision, AWS Lambda, S3, API Gateway, Docker  |  GitHub  |  Live
• Productionized a CNN interpretability tool running images through 12 models, visualizing how each predicts.
• Ran inference across 12 ImageNet models with PyTorch and torchvision, returning top-5 predictions per image.
• Captured activations with PyTorch forward hooks, rendering the top-32 channel feature maps per hooked layer.
• Overlaid multi-layer Grad-CAM heatmaps onto the image, highlighting regions driving each top class prediction.
• Served jobs through an async pipeline with SHA-256 LRU caching, hits in <10ms versus 180–300ms inference.
ShipCheck: Repository Quality Analyzer
Jan 2026 – Apr 2026
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, NetworkX, tree-sitter, Playwright, k6  |  GitHub  |  Live
• Engineered a static-analysis SaaS scoring public GitHub repos across 6 weighted quality categories.
• Ingested repos via the GitHub REST API, capping scans at 250 files or 5MB for stable latency.
• Parsed code with tree-sitter and Python AST to detect routes, smells, secrets, and dependency gaps.
• Modeled a NetworkX import graph to flag cycles, god modules, central files, and orphans.
• Authored a 9-analyzer scoring engine turning severity, confidence, and scope into fix recommendations.
FactoryApp: Manufacturing ERP for an SMB Manufacturer
WPF, C#, .NET, Node.js, Express, SQLite, QuestPDF  |  GitHub
• Sold and deployed a .NET WPF ERP used by an SMB manufacturer for daily production.
• Centralized data access in a C# repository over 11 SQLite tables, using injection-safe parameterized queries.
• Wrapped stock adjustments in database transactions to keep inventory atomic and consistent.
• Secured logins with PBKDF2-SHA256 at 210K iterations, 16-byte salts, and timing-safe compares.
